tags.name: `mc-code-preview`
tags.description:
Purpose: Component to display formatted code snippets with syntax highlighting, copy-to-clipboard, and multiple code variant support.
Category: Content Display, Data Display
When to use: Use when you need to present code examples, API payloads, or configuration snippets in a readable, interactive format.
When not to use: Not for displaying large files, unformatted text, or non-code content.
Works with components: mc-button, mc-tab-bar, mc-menu, mc-list, mc-list-item, mc-tooltip
Alternative component names: Code Block, Code Viewer, Code Example, Code Snippet
Extra notes: Supports multiple code variants (tab-bar or select), copy-to-clipboard, and theme adaptation (light/dark).

Slots:

  * `heading` {} - Slot for a custom heading above the code panel.

  * `footer` {} - Slot for a custom footer below the code panel.

Attributes:

  * `fit` {Fit} - The fit of the component.

  * `appearance` {Appearance} - The appearance of the component.

  * `variant` {Variant} - The appearance of the component.

  * `code` {IMcCode[]} - The code array to be displayed.

  * `hidetoggle` {boolean} - Hides the toggle button. If not set the toggle button will be displayed.

  * `heading` {string} - The heading of the code preview.

  * `footer` {string} - The footer of the code preview.

Properties:

  * `mcMenu` - 

  * `currentElementIndex` {`number`} - 

  * `showCodePanel` {`boolean`} - 

  * `copyLabel` {`string`} - 

  * `hasFooterSlot` {`boolean`} - 

  * `footerSlotElements` {`HTMLElement[]`} - 

  * `fit` {Fit} - The fit of the component.

  * `appearance` {Appearance} - The appearance of the component.

  * `variant` {Variant} - The appearance of the component.

  * `code` {IMcCode[]} - The code array to be displayed.

  * `hidetoggle` {boolean} - Hides the toggle button. If not set the toggle button will be displayed.

  * `heading` {string} - The heading of the code preview.

  * `footer` {string} - The footer of the code preview.

attributes.name: fit
attributes.description:
`fit` {Fit} - The fit of the component.

Property: fit

Default: medium

attributes.name: appearance
attributes.description:
`appearance` {Appearance} - The appearance of the component.

Property: appearance

Default: default

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description:
`variant` {Variant} - The appearance of the component.

Property: variant

Default: tab-bar

attributes.name: code
attributes.description:
`code` {IMcCode[]} - The code array to be displayed.

Property: code

Default: []

attributes.name: hidetoggle
attributes.description:
`hidetoggle` {boolean} - Hides the toggle button. If not set the toggle button will be displayed.

Property: hidetoggle

Default: false

attributes.name: heading
attributes.description:
`heading` {string} - The heading of the code preview.

Property: heading

Default: null

attributes.name: footer
attributes.description:
`footer` {string} - The footer of the code preview.

Property: footer

Default: null
